title: US Navy tells shipping industry Hormuz escorts not possible for now
label: Soft paywall

Either that his steam powered magnet & zapped-shark-powered ship didn't work as he planned. "Windmills damaged it!"

Oil producing nations are shutting down oil production because they ran out of places to store it. When the Hormuz opens back up, it will take a while to switch oil production back to full. It's not like a there is a simple "on" switch.

comments.body:
The Strait of Hormuz is 21 miles wide, but only 2 miles of that is actually navigatiable for large tankers.

Along the Iranian coastline, there's a 2000m elevation change, and the mountainous region makes it very easy to Iran to shell or deploy drones from.

Large US Navy vessels have very impressive offensive abilities, but very little in the way of defence, beyond protecting themselves, and the mountainous valleys and coastline makes it difficult for targeting.

And lastly, the cost of insuring vessels has skyrocketed. This has to be paid twice, both when entering and exiting the strait and it also calls into question who would be paying out, if a vessel is damaged and the US gov said they would garentee passage.

replies.body:
Well, shit. So the Strait is completely closed? Should people living in the Gulf start storing food and fuel? 

I'm Iraqi and I know people who have started stockpiling but I can't tell if its just fear mongering or if there's a real risk of blockade. 

Its not just the Strait. A lot of our food is imported from Iran...
Damn I thought you shared the article for a sec. Wild we get so many paywalled/account creation needed posts

comments.body: Fox News is currently telling the Navy to “be brave” and go through Hormuz anyway. This is not a game. More lives will be put at risk if they bullishly charge ahead. They probably will anyway.

replies.body: Present the show live from on top of the tanker then you brave patriots

Yup, the irgc plan of battle is using hundreds of small attack craft and gunboats. A destroyer can absolutely take them out easy, but all it takes is one getting through and suddenly the situation is much much worse
